references.hebrew: כִּי֩ אֶת־הַבְּכֹ֨ר בֶּן־הַשְּׂנוּאָ֜ה יַכִּ֗יר לָ֤תֶת לוֹ֙ פִּ֣י שְׁנַ֔יִם בְּכֹ֥ל אֲשֶׁר־יִמָּצֵ֖א ל֑וֹ כִּי־הוּא֙ רֵאשִׁ֣ית אֹנ֔וֹ ל֖וֹ מִשְׁפַּ֥ט הַבְּכֹרָֽה׃ {ס}
references.english: Instead, he must accept the first-born, the son of the unloved one, and allot to him a double portioncdouble portion Lit. two-thirds. of all he possesses; since he is the first fruit of his vigor, the birthright is his due.
references.matched_snippet: הכירא למאי הלכתא לתת לו פי שנים

references.hebrew: וְנֵ֤ר אֱלֹהִים֙ טֶ֣רֶם יִכְבֶּ֔ה וּשְׁמוּאֵ֖ל שֹׁכֵ֑ב בְּהֵיכַ֣ל יְהֹוָ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־שָׁ֖ם אֲר֥וֹן אֱלֹהִֽים׃ {פ}
references.english: The lamp of God had not yet gone out, and Samuel was sleeping in the temple of G<small>OD</small> where the Ark of God was.
references.matched_snippet: ליה אין דכתיב ונר אלהים טרם יכבה

references.hebrew: וְאַלְמָנָה֙ וּגְרוּשָׁ֔ה לֹא־יִקְח֥וּ לָהֶ֖ם לְנָשִׁ֑ים כִּ֣י אִם־בְּתוּלֹ֗ת מִזֶּ֙רַע֙ בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְהָֽאַלְמָנָה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר תִּֽהְיֶ֣ה אַלְמָנָ֔ה מִכֹּהֵ֖ן יִקָּֽחוּ׃
references.english: They shall not marry widows or divorced women of the stock of the House of Israel, but only virgins;fof the stock of the House of Israel, but only virgins Phrases transposed for clarity. or they may marry widows who are widows of priests.
